FeatureName: Duplicate detection within cluster burst groups
Description: Inspect the Epic 2 cluster manifest and identify near-duplicate photos only when they belong to the same final cluster and the same burst group.

Stories.StoryDescription: Read `cluster_manifest.json` and group members by `cluster_id` and `burst_group_id` so Epic 3 only compares photos inside the intended duplicate scope.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Cleanup code can enumerate candidate groups from the Epic 2 manifest without using any AI services.

Stories.StoryDescription: Auto-orient, convert to RGB, resize to a canonical comparison size, and compute a deterministic visual similarity score with a default duplicate threshold of 0.99.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Near-duplicate detection is deterministic, configurable, and covered by automated tests.

Stories.StoryDescription: Collapse pairwise duplicate matches into connected duplicate sets so one cleanup decision can be made per duplicate group.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Duplicate chains produce one connected duplicate set and automated tests cover grouped duplicate scenarios.
